name: agent-bark-notify
description: Bark push notification to iPhone/Apple Watch when Claude Code finishes a turn. Also supports Codex CLI.

bark_key.title: Bark device key
bark_key.description: 打开 iPhone 上的 Bark app，复制 device key（URL 里 api.day.app/ 后面那串）

bark_server.title: Bark server URL
bark_server.description: 自建 Bark 服务地址；留空用官方 https://api.day.app

sound.title: Sound name (optional)
sound.description: iOS 提示音名（如 calypso）；留空用 Bark app 默认
